from typing import List

def factorize(n: int) -> List[int]:
    """ Calculates the prime factorization and returns the factors in sorted order from lowest to highest. The list includes each prime as many times as it divides the input number. When all factors are multiplied, they yield the input integer.
    >>> factorize(8)
    [2, 2, 2]
    >>> factorize(25)
    [5, 5]
    >>> factorize(70)
    [2, 5, 7]
    """
